description: Out-of-scope (personality-patterns, edge-with-trauma-history): description points clearly to personality-patterns territory; classify should set outOfScope and return empty recommendations.

expectedQualities.notes: Should route to outOfScope with category 'personality-patterns'. No path recommendations.

payload.intakeText: I had a chaotic childhood and I think it shaped me. I have abandonment issues — I cling to people, then push them away when I'm sure they're going to leave. My relationships all end the same way and have for as long as I can remember. I've been in therapy on and off for a decade and it hasn't really shifted the pattern.
